backpack.name: Backpack
backpack.description: A sturdy pack with straps, holding up to 30 pounds of gear.

bedroll.name: Bedroll
bedroll.description: A padded roll for sleeping outdoors in some comfort.

blanket.name: Blanket
blanket.description: A heavy woven blanket for warmth on cold nights.

rope-hempen-50ft.name: Rope, Hempen (50 feet)
rope-hempen-50ft.description: Sturdy rope useful for climbing or binding.

rope-silk-50ft.name: Rope, Silk (50 feet)
rope-silk-50ft.description: A lighter, stronger cord favored by climbers who can afford it.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A wooden stake wrapped in oil-soaked cloth, burning for about an hour and shedding bright light in a 20-foot radius.

tinderbox.name: Tinderbox
tinderbox.description: Flint, fire steel, and tinder used to kindle flames.

rations-1-day.name: Rations (1 day)
rations-1-day.description: Dried meat, hardtack, and fruit sufficient to sustain a traveler for a day.

waterskin.name: Waterskin
waterskin.description: A sealed skin that holds about four days' worth of water.

thieves-tools.name: Thieves' Tools
thieves-tools.description: A small file, lockpicks, a mirror on a handle, and other tools for bypassing locks and disarming traps.

healers-kit.name: Healer's Kit
healers-kit.description: Bandages, salves, and splints used to stabilize the dying and treat wounds. Has 10 uses.

component-pouch.name: Component Pouch
component-pouch.description: A small watertight pouch holding the material components needed to cast most spells.

holy-symbol.name: Holy Symbol
holy-symbol.description: An emblem of a deity used as a focus for divine spellcasting.

arcane-focus.name: Arcane Focus
arcane-focus.description: A crystal, orb, rod, staff, or wand that channels arcane energy in place of material components.

druidic-focus.name: Druidic Focus
druidic-focus.description: A sprig of mistletoe, a carved totem, or a similar natural object used to channel primal magic.

explorers-pack.name: Explorer's Pack
explorers-pack.description: A backpack stocked with a bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, torches, rations, and a waterskin, plus 50 feet of hempen rope tied to the pack.

dungeoneers-pack.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
dungeoneers-pack.description: A backpack containing a crowbar, hammer, pitons, torches, tinderbox, rations, waterskin, and 50 feet of hempen rope.

priests-pack.name: Priest's Pack
priests-pack.description: A backpack holding a blanket, candles, tinderbox, alms box, censer, vestments, rations, and a waterskin.

scholars-pack.name: Scholar's Pack
scholars-pack.description: A backpack containing a book of lore, ink, an ink pen, parchment, a small bag of sand, and a small knife.

burglars-pack.name: Burglar's Pack
burglars-pack.description: A backpack with a ball of string, a bell, candles, a crowbar, a hammer, pitons, a hooded lantern, oil, rations, and a waterskin, plus 50 feet of hempen rope.

diplomats-pack.name: Diplomat's Pack
diplomats-pack.description: A chest holding fine clothes, an ink pen, a lamp, oil, paper, a case of maps and scrolls, perfume, sealing wax, and soap.

entertainers-pack.name: Entertainer's Pack
entertainers-pack.description: A backpack with a bedroll, costumes, candles, makeup, rations, and a waterskin.

lantern-bullseye.name: Lantern, Bullseye
lantern-bullseye.description: A shuttered lantern that casts bright light in a 60-foot cone, burning oil at a rate of one flask per 6 hours.

lantern-hooded.name: Lantern, Hooded
lantern-hooded.description: A shielded lantern that casts bright light in a 30-foot radius, burning oil at a rate of one flask per 6 hours.

oil-flask.name: Oil (flask)
oil-flask.description: A flask of combustible oil that can fuel a lantern or be thrown as an improvised weapon.

grappling-hook.name: Grappling Hook
grappling-hook.description: A multi-pronged iron hook used to catch on ledges and anchor climbing rope.

crowbar.name: Crowbar
crowbar.description: An iron bar useful for prying open doors, crates, and other stuck objects.

manacles.name: Manacles
manacles.description: Metal restraints for binding a captive's wrists, secured with a small key.

mess-kit.name: Mess Kit
mess-kit.description: A tin plate, cup, and utensils that collapse for easy storage while traveling.

tent.name: Tent, Two-Person
tent.description: A simple canvas shelter that sleeps two people out of the weather.

climbers-kit.name: Climber's Kit
climbers-kit.description: Special pitons, boot tips, gloves, and a harness that aid in scaling sheer surfaces.

disguise-kit.name: Disguise Kit
disguise-kit.description: Cosmetics, hair dye, and props used to alter one's appearance.

forgery-kit.name: Forgery Kit
forgery-kit.description: Papers, inks, seals, and tools for duplicating documents and signatures.

herbalism-kit.name: Herbalism Kit
herbalism-kit.description: Clippers, a mortar and pestle, and pouches used to identify and prepare herbs and remedies.

poisoners-kit.name: Poisoner's Kit
poisoners-kit.description: Vials, chemicals, and tools used to create and handle poisons safely.

spyglass.name: Spyglass
spyglass.description: A brass and glass tube that magnifies distant objects two-fold.

signal-whistle.name: Signal Whistle
signal-whistle.description: A small brass whistle whose piercing note carries across a battlefield or camp.

sealing-wax.name: Sealing Wax
sealing-wax.description: A stick of wax used with a signet to seal letters and documents.

parchment.name: Parchment (one sheet)
parchment.description: A single sheet of treated animal hide suitable for writing.

ink-and-quill.name: Ink and Quill
ink-and-quill.description: A vial of ink paired with a feather quill for writing.

spellbook.name: Spellbook
spellbook.description: A blank leather-bound tome of 100 pages suitable for recording arcane spells.

potion-of-healing.name: Potion of Healing
potion-of-healing.description: Drinking this restores 2d4+2 hit points to the drinker.

potion-of-greater-healing.name: Potion of Greater Healing
potion-of-greater-healing.description: Drinking this restores 4d4+4 hit points to the drinker.

potion-of-superior-healing.name: Potion of Superior Healing
potion-of-superior-healing.description: Drinking this restores 8d4+8 hit points to the drinker.

scroll-of-protection.name: Scroll of Protection
scroll-of-protection.description: Reading the scroll's inscription surrounds the reader with a warded circle that hinders a chosen type of creature from approaching or attacking for a short time.

weapon-plus-1.name: Weapon, +1
weapon-plus-1.description: This finely balanced weapon grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

weapon-plus-2.name: Weapon, +2
weapon-plus-2.description: This finely balanced weapon grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

weapon-plus-3.name: Weapon, +3
weapon-plus-3.description: This finely balanced weapon grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it.

armor-plus-1.name: Armor, +1
armor-plus-1.description: This armor is subtly reinforced by magic, granting a +1 bonus to AC while worn.

armor-plus-2.name: Armor, +2
armor-plus-2.description: This armor is reinforced by magic, granting a +2 bonus to AC while worn.

shield-plus-1.name: Shield, +1
shield-plus-1.description: This shield is subtly reinforced by magic, granting a +1 bonus to AC while wielded, in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

bag-of-holding.name: Bag of Holding
bag-of-holding.description: This bag's interior opens into a small extradimensional space that can hold far more than its outside dimensions would suggest, up to a fixed weight limit.

cloak-of-protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak-of-protection.description: While wearing this cloak, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

ring-of-protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring-of-protection.description: While wearing this ring, the wearer gains a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

wand-of-magic-missiles.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
wand-of-magic-missiles.description: This wand holds 7 charges. While holding it, the wielder can expend 1 or more charges to cast Magic Missile, adding one extra dart per additional charge spent. The wand regains 1d6+1 expended charges daily at dawn.

staff-of-healing.name: Staff of Healing
staff-of-healing.description: This staff holds 10 charges and can be used to cast several healing spells by expending charges. It regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn.

boots-of-speed.name: Boots of Speed
boots-of-speed.description: While wearing these boots, the wearer can click the heels together as a bonus action to double their walking speed for up to 10 minutes, though they age slightly faster from the exertion.

cloak-of-elvenkind.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
cloak-of-elvenkind.description: This hooded cloak shifts in hue to match its surroundings, granting advantage on Stealth checks made to hide while the hood is up.

bracers-of-defense.name: Bracers of Defense
bracers-of-defense.description: While wearing these bracers and no armor or shield, the wearer gains a +2 bonus to AC.

amulet-of-health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet-of-health.description: The wearer's Constitution score becomes 19 while this amulet is worn, if it was not already higher.

headband-of-intellect.name: Headband of Intellect
headband-of-intellect.description: The wearer's Intelligence score becomes 19 while this headband is worn, if it was not already higher.

gauntlets-of-ogre-power.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
gauntlets-of-ogre-power.description: The wearer's Strength score becomes 19 while these gauntlets are worn, if it was not already higher.

periapt-of-wound-closure.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
periapt-of-wound-closure.description: While wearing this pendant, the wearer stabilizes automatically upon dropping to 0 hit points, and any healing they receive is increased by 2d8.

rope-of-climbing.name: Rope of Climbing
rope-of-climbing.description: This 60-foot silk rope can animate on command to knot, unknot, coil, or fasten itself as directed by its owner.

immovable-rod.name: Immovable Rod
immovable-rod.description: This iron rod can be fixed in place with the press of a button, holding its position in space as if fastened there magically, and can support significant weight while fixed.

decanter-of-endless-water.name: Decanter of Endless Water
decanter-of-endless-water.description: This stoppered flask produces fresh or salt water on command, ranging from a gentle trickle to a forceful torrent capable of knocking creatures over.

portable-hole.name: Portable Hole
portable-hole.description: This circle of black cloth unfolds into a temporary extradimensional space six feet deep, which closes if picked up from the inside or removed from its cloth.

robe-of-the-archmagi.name: Robe of the Archmagi
robe-of-the-archmagi.description: This finely woven robe grants a bonus to AC, advantage on saving throws against spells, and increased save DCs for the wearer's own spells while worn by a spellcaster.

vorpal-sword.name: Vorpal Sword
vorpal-sword.description: This magic sword grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls, and on a natural 20 to hit, it can sever the target's head outright if the creature is capable of being decapitated.

deck-of-many-things.name: Deck of Many Things
deck-of-many-things.description: This deck of enchanted cards holds unpredictable and often life-altering fates for anyone who dares draw from it, ranging from tremendous fortune to utter ruin.
